designSystem.style: Dark glassmorphism with vibrant purple-cyan gradient accents, pill-shaped mood selectors, animated equalizer in Dynamic Island, and context-aware card system with glowing borders

screens: Home – Context-aware suggestions with live signal chips (weather, time, location, calendar), suggested mixes, and smart transition prompts
Build Mix – Mood selector grid (6 moods), activity picker (6 activities), animated playlist generator with progress bar and track preview
Player – Full album art with gradient glow, interactive scrubber, playback controls, and scrollable queue
History – Weekly stats row, chronological mix log with mood badges, and MoodMix learning insight card
Settings – Profile card, dark/light theme toggle, context signal toggles (location/notifications/calendar/weather), music service connection
